slides.image_prompt:
Slide 1/8 role=hook. Thai copy: อย่าเริ่มจาก AI Agent เริ่มจากเช็กลิสต์งานซ้ำก่อน
API • Token • workflow • MCP. Visual direction: bold cover slide, strong Thai headline based on the real source idea, cute robot mascot, practical AI design/workflow icons, small GenLabs logo in a corner. Hand-drawn Thai sketchnote infographic style. Balanced 50% useful Thai text and 50% graphics: cute robots, icons, arrows, marker lines, rounded cards, section badges, checkmarks, simple diagrams. Mobile-readable mini-lesson: one core idea per slide, enough detail to teach a useful technique, no dense paragraphs. Render the Thai copy exactly as provided; do not substitute similar-looking Thai words or alter spelling. Thai spelling QA: use กฎ not กฏ, use ชัดขึ้น without an extra space, use โทนแบรนด์ not ทงแบรนด์, keep ด้วย AI ใน 5 ขั้นตอน together in that order, and keep product/tool names exactly as written. Include a small GenLabs logo/brand mark in a corner or footer, never oversized. Do not include analytics, learning-loop elements, or fake dashboards.

Mobile-readable mini-lesson: one core idea per slide, enough detail to teach a useful technique, no dense paragraphs. clean_brief.clean_headline: ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners: How to Actually Get Work Done with AI Kevin Stratvert Learn how to use ChatGPT step by step in this complete beginner's tutorial
clean_brief.clean_summary: ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners: How to Actually Get Work Done with AI Kevin Stratvert Learn how to use ChatGPT step by step in this complete beginner's tutorial. Whether you're brand new to AI or you've only used ... Transcript: ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners: How to Actually Get Work Done with AI Description ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners: How to Actually Get Work Done with AI 70 Likes 480 Views 1h Ago Learn how to use ChatGPT step by step in this complete beginner's tutorial. Whether you're brand new to AI or you've only used ChatGPT to ask a few questions, this guide will show you how to use ChatGPT to save time, write better, research faster, and become more productive. In this ChatGPT tutorial, you'll learn everything from the basics to advanced features. We'll cover the free version of ChatGPT along with premium features, and I'll clearly point out which tools require a ChatGPT Plus subscription. In this video, you'll learn how to: * Write, edit, and improve emails, documents, and other content through natural conversation * Upload PDFs, Word documents, Excel spreadsheets, and images to instantly summarize, analyze, and ask questions about them * Research topics, compare products, and organize information with AI * Create plans, calendars, checklists, presentations, and other documents from scratch * Generate ideas, brainstorm solutions, and overcome writer's block * Connect ChatGPT to Zapier for easier automation * Save chats into Projects to organize your work (ChatGPT Plus) * Use Memory so ChatGPT remembers your preferences across conversations (ChatGPT Plus) * Customize ChatGPT to work the way you do Whether you're using ChatGPT for work, school, your business, or everyday life, you'll leave with practical skills you can start using immediately. Host: Garrick Chow Sponsor: Zapier [#ChatGPT]( 📚 RESOURCES Zapier MCP: [ ⌚ TIMESTAMPS [00:00]( - Introduction [00:49]( - Create a free account [01:10]( - Explore the interface [01:45]( - Generate and refine an email [03:46]( - Summarize and analyze your files [05:23]( - Research topics and compare options [07:18]( - Create plans [08:58]( - Create and use projects [11:15]( - Connect ChatGPT to the apps and services you use with Zapier [12:27]( - View and edit ChatGPT’s memory [13:59]( - Conclusion 📩 NEWSLETTER * Get the latest high-quality tutorial and tips and tricks videos emailed to your inbox each week: [ 🔽 CONNECT WITH ME * Official website: [ * LinkedIn: [![Image 33]( ## Chapters View all [![Image 8]( ### Introduction ### Introduction 0:00]( ### [Introduction]( 0:00 [![Image 9]( ### Create a free account ### Create a free account 0:49]( ### [Create a free account]( 0:49 [![Image 10]( ### Explore the interface ### Explore the interface 1:10]( ### [Explore the interface]( 1:10 [![Image 11]( ### Generate and refine an email ### Generate and refine an email 1:45]( ### [Generate and refine an email]( 1:45 [![Image 12]( ### Summarize and analyze your files ### Summarize and analyze your files 3:46]( ### [Summarize and analyze your files]( 3:46 [![Image 13]( ### Research topics and compare options ### Research topics and compare options 5:23]( ### [Research topics and compare options]( 5:23 [![Image 14]( ### Create plans ### Create plans 7:18]( ### [Create plans]( 7:18 [![Image 15]( ### Create and use projects ### Create and use projects 8:58]( ### [Create and use projects]( 8:58 Transcript Follow along using the transcript. Show transcript [![Image 16]( ### Kevin Stratvert 4.32M subscribers]( [Videos]( 17]( Instagram]( 18]( TikTok](

YouTube title: ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners: How to Actually Get Work Done with AI
Channel: Kevin Stratvert
Description: Learn how to use ChatGPT step by step in this complete beginner's tutorial. Whether you're brand new to AI or you've only used ...
Transcript:
Title: ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners: How to Actually Get Work Done with AI Description ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners: How to Actually Get Work Done with AI 70 Likes 480 Views 1h Ago Learn how to use ChatGPT step by step in this complete beginner's tutorial. Whether you're brand new to AI or you've only used ChatGPT to ask a few questions, this guide will show you how to use ChatGPT to save time, write better, research faster, and become more productive. In this ChatGPT tutorial, you'll learn everything from the basics to advanced features. We'll cover the free version of ChatGPT along with premium features, and I'll clearly point out which tools require a ChatGPT Plus subscription. In this video, you'll learn how to: * Write, edit, and improve emails, documents, and other content through natural conversation * Upload PDFs, Word documents, Excel spreadsheets, and images to instantly summarize, analyze, and ask questions about them * Research topics, compare products, and organize information with AI * Create plans, calendars, checklists, presentations, and other documents from scratch * Generate ideas, brainstorm solutions, and overcome writer's block * Connect ChatGPT to Zapier for easier automation * Save chats into Projects to organize your work (ChatGPT Plus) * Use Memory so ChatGPT remembers your preferences across conversations (ChatGPT Plus) * Customize ChatGPT to work the way you do Whether you're using ChatGPT for work, school, your business, or everyday life, you'll leave with practical skills you can start using immediately. Host: Garrick Chow Sponsor: Zapier generation_qa_checklist: Content-graphic match: every icon, diagram, UI mockup, and visual metaphor must directly support the exact Thai copy on that slide.
No hallucinated product claims: use only source facts, provided keywords, and GenLabs teaching interpretation; do not invent dates, metrics, features, dashboards, or partnerships.
Source-media discipline: if source images are provided, borrow only broad layout/mood/interaction cues; do not copy exact source text, UI, brand styling, or composition.
Thai readability: mobile-readable, natural Thai, no clipped words, no garbled characters, no typos, and no dense paragraphs.
Carousel coherence: slide order must tell one mini-story from hook to problem to why it matters to steps to CTA.
Public safety: no public external links, X handles, channel labels, creator names, or attribution text in generated images or caption; attribution stays internal in Airtable/manifest.

social_post.description:
👋 เหมาะกับใคร: คนเริ่มใช้ AI, เจ้าของร้าน, คนทำคอนเทนต์, ฟรีแลนซ์ หรือทีมเล็กที่อยากเอา AI ไปใช้กับงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่ดูข่าวแล้วผ่านไป

💡 ไอเดียหลัก: หลายคนอยากทำ AI Agent แต่ยังไม่รู้ว่างานซ้ำจริง ๆ ของตัวเองคืออะไร เลยดู tutorial เยอะแล้วทำต่อไม่ได้

📌 ทำไมควรเซฟโพสต์นี้: โพสต์แนว agent/workflow ชนะเมื่อสอนให้เริ่มจากงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่โชว์เครื่องมือ

✅ วิธีเอาไปใช้แบบง่าย ๆ:

1) ✨ จดงานซ้ำที่ทำทุกสัปดาห์ 5 อย่าง

2) ✨ เลือกงานที่มีกฎชัดที่สุด 1 งาน

3) ✨ เขียน input/output ที่ต้องการ

4) ✨ ให้ AI ช่วยทำเช็กลิสต์ก่อน แล้วค่อยต่อ automation

🧪 ลองเริ่มวันนี้: วันนี้เลือกงานซ้ำ 1 งาน แล้วเขียนเช็กลิสต์ให้ AI ช่วยทำทีละขั้น

🧭 วิธีใช้กับงานนี้: จดงานซ้ำที่ทำทุกสัปดาห์ 5 อย่าง → เลือกงานที่มีกฎชัดที่สุด 1 งาน → เขียน input/output ที่ต้องการ

🌱 มือใหม่ให้เริ่มจากเคสจริงเล็ก ๆ ของอุตสาหกรรมนี้ แล้วให้คนในทีมตรวจคำตอบก่อนใช้กับลูกค้าจริง

🔖 เซฟโพสต์นี้ไว้เป็นเช็กลิสต์ แล้วลองทำตาม 1 รอบวันนี้ ถ้าทำได้ คุณจะเห็นว่า AI ช่วยลดงานซ้ำและทำให้บริการชัดขึ้นได้จริง

🚀 ติดตาม GenLabs AI Learning สำหรับบทเรียน AI ภาษาไทยที่สั้น เข้าใจง่าย และเอาไปใช้กับงาน/ธุรกิจได้ทันที
